---
title: ""
title-block-style: none
anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="theme-banner" style="--theme-bg: #8C5E2A;"><div class="banner-title">Border &amp; Immigration</div><p class="banner-sub">2,382 posts where this was the primary topic.</p></div>
```


<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>


<div id="theme-volume" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015", "2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"], y: [11, 29, 71, 115, 182, 83, 106, 271, 372, 213, 71, 198, 361, 227, 72],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#8C5E2A" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 35, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      height: 260, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("theme-volume", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>


<p class="small-caps">Recurring phrases</p>
<span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>https www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>southern border</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>united states</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>border security</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>border patrol</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>illegal aliens</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>donald trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>joe biden</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>com news</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>illegal immigration</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>president trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>secure border</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>illegal immigrants</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>open borders</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8C5E2A'>crooked joe</span>


::: {.muted}
Showing the top 40 posts ranked by how clearly they match this theme. Other secondary themes for each post are shown as chips.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="post-stream"><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 17, 2014  15:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;With our border not being secure</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_479001201447796737" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/479001201447796737" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 05, 2014  15:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;SECURE THE BORDER! BUILD A WALL!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_496756082489171968" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/496756082489171968" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 30, 2015  15:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The border is wide open for cartels &amp; terrorists. Secure our border now. Build a massive wall &amp; deduct the costs from Mexican foreign aid!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_582645393227419648" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/582645393227419648" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 16, 2015  09:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Our border is being breached daily by criminals. We must build a wall &amp; deduct costs from Mexican foreign aid!http://www.donaldjtrump.com/&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_588716146792263682" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/588716146792263682" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 27, 2015  14:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We must build a wall to secure our border. It will save lives and help Make America Great Again!https://www.donaldjtrump.com/&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_625753618797457408" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/625753618797457408" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 09, 2015  14:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ paulfincher2 Keep the faith. Elect @ realDonaldTrump and there will be no more sanctuary cities. and very few illegals.&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_652570897480589312" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/652570897480589312" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 28, 2016  20:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We need to secure our borders ASAP. No games</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_714619931938197504" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/714619931938197504" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 01, 2016  16:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We must build a great wall between Mexico and the United States!http://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-3518397/Moment-two-drugs-smugglers-filmed-news-crew-sneaking-U-S-scaling-Arizona-border-fence.html ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_716019755682045952" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/716019755682045952" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 16, 2018  21:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We must have Security at our VERY DANGEROUS SOUTHERN BORDER</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_953264081871495168" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/953264081871495168" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 18, 2018  21:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We need the Wall for the safety and security of our country. We need the Wall to help stop the massive inflow of drugs from Mexico</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_953979393180950528" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/953979393180950528" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2018  19:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to Brandon Judd of the National Border Patrol Council for his strong statement on @foxandfriends that we very badly NEED THE WALL. Must also end loophole of “catch &amp;amp; release” and clean up the legal and other procedures at the border NOW for Safety &amp;amp; Security reasons.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_957220637705109505" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/957220637705109505" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 04, 2018  18:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Our Southern Border is under siege. Congress must act now to change our weak and ineffective immigration laws. Must build a Wall. Mexico</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_992348740529815552" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/992348740529815552" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 30, 2018  19:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We must have Border Security</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1023900404352991232" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1023900404352991232" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 22, 2018  03:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Full efforts are being made to stop the onslaught of illegal aliens from crossing our Souther Border. People have to apply for asylum in Mexico first</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1054087893034172418" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1054087893034172418" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 22, 2018  20:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....and Safety at the Border</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1065583286188158976" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1065583286188158976" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 23, 2018  04:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The crisis of illegal activity at our Southern Border is real and will not stop until we build a great Steel Barrier or Wall. Let work begin!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1076569051768516608" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1076569051768516608" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 28, 2018  05:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;There is right now a full scale manhunt going on in California for an illegal immigrant accused of shooting and killing a police officer during a traffic stop. Time to get tough on Border Security. Build the Wall!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1078396126619930624" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1078396126619930624" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2019  20:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....The only reason they do not want to build a Wall is that Walls Work! 99% of our illegal Border crossings will end</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1081891545245278208" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1081891545245278208" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2019  22:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Mexico is doing NOTHING to stop the Caravan which is now fully formed and heading to the United States. We stopped the last two - many are still in Mexico but can’t get through our Wall</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1086626739835625474" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1086626739835625474" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  07:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Four people in Nevada viciously robbed and killed by an illegal immigrant who should not have been in our Country. 26 people killed on the Border in a drug and gang related fight. Two large Caravans from Honduras broke into Mexico and are headed our way. We need a powerful Wall!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087494416347074561" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087494416347074561" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2019  22:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Never seen @senatemajldr and Republicans so united on an issue as they are on the Humanitarian Crisis &amp;amp; Security on our Southern Border. If we create a Wall or Barrier which prevents Criminals and Drugs from flowing into our Country</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087723755898658816" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087723755898658816" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2019  22:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Tremendous numbers of people are coming up through Mexico in the hopes of flooding our Southern Border. We have sent additional military. We will build a Human Wall if necessary. If we had a real Wall</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1092787440560078849" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1092787440560078849" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 08, 2019  21:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We are apprehending record numbers of illegal immigrants - but we need the Wall to help our great Border Patrol Agents!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1104017664131907584" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1104017664131907584" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 09, 2019  22:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Border Patrol and Law Enforcement has apprehended (captured) large numbers of illegal immigrants at the Border. They won’t be coming into the U.S. The Wall is being built and will greatly help us in the future</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1104383134529998849" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1104383134529998849" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 03, 2019  21:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congress must get together and immediately eliminate the loopholes at the Border! If no action</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1113437257493561344" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1113437257493561344" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 14, 2019  09:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just out: The USA has the absolute legal right to have apprehended illegal immigrants transferred to Sanctuary Cities. We hereby demand that they be taken care of at the highest level</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1117242926654947328" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1117242926654947328" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2022"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2022.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 21, 2022  20:20</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">NO AMNESTY! Our border is open because Joe Biden has ordered it to be open and because Biden has broken the law and torn it into shreds. He has shredded our system, and he is destroying our Country. We need a total ban on Biden using taxpayer dollars to free illegal aliens — and criminal penalties for administrative noncompliance, which happens every single minute of every single day.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109553519887487832" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109553519887487832" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2022"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2022.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 21, 2022  21:47</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @realDonaldTrumpNO AMNESTY! Our border is open because Joe Biden has ordered it to be open and because Biden has broken the law and torn it into shreds. He has shredded our system, and he is destroying our Country. We need a total ban on Biden using taxpayer dollars to free illegal aliens — and criminal penalties for administrative noncompliance, which happens every single minute of every single day.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109553861221335696" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109553861221335696" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 03, 2023  18:04</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Let Brandon Judd and the GREAT Border Patrol do their job. Just 3 years ago, we had the safest and best Border in U.S. History, BY FAR!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110136200056724359" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110136200056724359" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 28, 2023  01:29</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @repandybiggsazThe crisis at our border is completely ignored by the Biden Administration.Secretary Mayorkas’s favorite lie is that the border is closed. He should try telling that to the families destroyed by fentanyl and crimes committed by illegal aliens.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110964648340977058" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110964648340977058" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 04, 2023  23:10</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Job number one will be to stop the invasion on our Southern Border. Terrorists are pouring into our Country…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111354803211159483" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111354803211159483" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2024  17:13</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">OUR BORDER HAS BECOME A WEAPON OF MASS DESTRUCTION — OUR DESTRUCTION!!!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111829030293275733" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111829030293275733" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 10, 2024  20:33</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">What Crooked Joe is doing to our border is a crime against this nation!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111909090492713014" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111909090492713014" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 05, 2024  20:01</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">“You have to recognize that the [Trump Border] policies actually worked,&quot; says President of the National Border Patrol Council, Brandon Judd…&quot;When you bring back catch-and-release, you are inviting people to cross ours borders illegally — and that&#x27;s exactly what [Biden] has done.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112220393347751192" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112220393347751192" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 21, 2024  20:40</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @TeamTrumpPRESIDENT TRUMP: &quot;Today, I am announcing a new plan to end ALL Sanctuary Cities in North Carolina and across the country. As soon as I take office, we will immediately surge federal law enforcement to every city that is failing to turn over criminal aliens.&quot;&quot;I will ask Congress to pass a law OUTLAWING Sanctuary Cities nationwide and we will bring down the full weight of the federal government on any jurisdiction that refuses to cooperate with ICE and Border Patrol.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113177477133823920" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113177477133823920" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 11, 2024  21:27</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @TeamTrump- End Catch and Release- Restore Remain in Mexico- Bring back Title 42- Ban Sanctuary Cities- Begin the largest decoration operation in American history- Close the border- Stop the invasion- Defend our territory.WE WILL NOT BE CONQUERED. WE WILL RECLAIM OUR SOVEREIGNTY.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113290908651155374" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113290908651155374" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 03, 2024  18:15</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @TeamTrumpPRESIDENT TRUMP: After years of building up foreign nations, defending foreign borders, and protecting foreign lands, we are finally going to build up OUR country, defend our borders, and protect OUR citizens. And we will stop illegal immigration once and for all.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113420385509285425" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113420385509285425" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 12, 2025  18:03</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Biden let 21 Million Unvetted, Illegal Aliens flood into the Country from some of the most dangerous and dysfunctional Nations on Earth â Many of them Rapists, Murderers, and Terrorists. This tsunami of Illegals has destroyed Americans&#x27; Public Schools, Hospitals, Parks, Community Resources, and Living Conditions. They have stolen American Jobs, consumed BILLIONS OF DOLLARS in Free Welfare, and turned once idyllic Communities, like Springfield, Ohio, into Third World Nightmares. I campaigned on, and received a Historic Mandate for, the largest Mass Deportation Program in American History. Polling shows overwhelming Public Support for getting the Illegals out, and that is exactly what we will do. As Commander-in-Chief, I will always protect and defend the Heroes of ICE and Border Patrol, whose work has already resulted in the Most Secure Border in American History. Anyone who assaults or attacks an ICE or Border Agent will do hard time in jail. Those who are here illegally should either self deport using the CBP Home App or, ICE will find you and remove you. Saving America is not negotiable!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114671706526373660" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114671706526373660" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 16, 2025  00:43</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Our Nationâs ICE Officers have shown incredible strength, determination, and courage as they facilitate a very important mission, the largest Mass Deportation Operation of Illegal Aliens in History. Every day, the Brave Men and Women of ICE are subjected to violence, harassment, and even threats from Radical Democrat Politicians, but nothing will stop us from executing our mission, and fulfilling our Mandate to the American People. ICE Officers are herewith ordered, by notice of this TRUTH, to do all in their power to achieve the very important goal of delivering the single largest Mass Deportation Program in History.In order to achieve this, we must expand efforts to detain and deport Illegal Aliens in Americaâs largest Cities, such as Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York, where Millions upon Millions of Illegal Aliens reside. These, and other such Cities, are the core of the Democrat Power Center, where they use Illegal Aliens to expand their Voter Base, cheat in Elections, and grow the Welfare State, robbing good paying Jobs and Benefits from Hardworking American Citizens. These Radical Left Democrats are sick of mind, hate our Country, and actually want to destroy our Inner Cities â And they are doing a good job of it! There is something wrong with them. That is why they believe in Open Borders, Transgender for Everybody, and Men playing in Womenâs Sports â And that is why I want ICE, Border Patrol, and our Great and Patriotic Law Enforcement Officers, to FOCUS on our crime ridden and deadly Inner Cities, and those places where Sanctuary Cities play such a big role. You donât hear about Sanctuary Cities in our Heartland!I want our Brave ICE Officers to know that REAL Americans are cheering you on every day. The American People want our Cities, Schools, and Communities to be SAFE and FREE from Illegal Alien Crime, Conflict, and Chaos. Thatâs why I have directed my entire Administration to put every resource possible behind this effort, and reverse the tide of Mass Destruction Migration that has turned once Idyllic Towns into scenes of Third World Dystopia. Our Federal Government will continue to be focused on the REMIGRATION of Aliens to the places from where they came, and preventing the admission of ANYONE who undermines the domestic tranquility of the United States.To ICE, FBI, DEA, ATF, the Patriots at Pentagon and the State Department, you have my unwavering support. Now go, GET THE JOB DONE! DJT</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114690267066155731" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114690267066155731" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2026"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2026.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 18, 2026  11:51</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">&quot;It&#x27;s important to know how we got here. The reckless Open Borders Policy of Joe Biden led to the violent criminals that have gone into places like Minneapolis, which has forced ICE to go in and clean them up.&quot; Fox &amp; Friends, Sunday.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115915952093312324" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115915952093312324" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div>
```


::: {.seal-divider}
![](../assets/seal.svg){width=60}
:::

[← Back to all topics](../themes.qmd){.small-caps}
